decision.primary_crux: Current fair value appears below the 0.76 market price, but the edge call is too sensitive to fresh lineup/rotation news and still lacks clean independent pre-kickoff price confirmation.
secondary_cruxes: This is a regulation-only win market, so normal soccer draw risk materially caps true win probability even for a strong home favorite.
The bounded verification supports Tolima as the favorite, but not strongly enough to justify paying a mid-70s implied probability.
The market may already incorporate fresher squad information than the verified bundle does.

valuation.compression_reason: Held below market because the verified evidence supports Tolima as a real favorite but does not justify paying 0.76 without fresh squad confirmation or a cleaner independent odds cross-check.

thesis_breakers: Fresh credible lineup or injury news indicating Tolima is materially stronger than assumed.
A clean independent pre-kickoff odds source supporting win probability at or above roughly 0.75.
Meaningful adverse squad or rotation news for Tolima that pushes fair value clearly below the high-60s.
time_breakers: No position should be authorized off this packet without a refreshed pre-kickoff verification pass.
Any material market move after lineup or news release invalidates this snapshot judgment.
market_structure_breakers: If settlement guidance changes away from standard regulation-plus-stoppage-time win resolution, re-evaluate immediately.
reversal_conditions: Upgrade to authorized yes only if refreshed verification both removes the lineup uncertainty and confirms fair value above the executable price by a meaningful margin.
Maintain no-trade or pass if late information lowers fair value further or if price remains rich versus refreshed estimates.

key_uncertainties: Tolima lineup, rotation, and injury status after the Apr 14 Libertadores match.
Whether the market already embeds fresher team news unavailable in the verified bundle.
Absence of a clean second independent odds source near decision time.
what_would_change_my_mind: Verified starting lineup and team-news clarity with no material negative surprise for Tolima.
Independent market or odds confirmation showing true win probability materially closer to or above 0.76.
A meaningful pre-kickoff repricing downward that creates a clear cushion versus refreshed fair value.
reasons_to_pass: Negative edge versus current market reference price.
Evidence quality is sufficient for directional judgment but not for execution confidence at this price.

audit.one_sentence_rationale: Tolima is probably the right side directionally, but with fair value around 0.71 and unresolved late-news risk, paying 0.76 is not justified, so this should remain watch-only pending refreshed verification.
notes: Upstream synthesis points below market and I agree on the direction of disagreement.
This is primarily a price-and-freshness problem, not a thesis that Tolima is unlikely to win.
Economically, the correct output is no trade until either price improves or late verification closes the information gap.
